copy-move-rename.label: Kopye, deplase, ak chanje non
copy-move-rename.summary: Sèvi ak cp ak mv pou fè kopi, òganize, epi chanje non fichye an sekirite.

sketch1.title: Deplase fichye ak katab avèk mv

copy-move-rename-try-it-1.title: Travay tèminal: kopye avèk cp
copy-move-rename-try-it-1.prompt: The destination katab already exists. Sèvi ak `cp` pou kopye `sample-inbox/agenda.txt` pou `warmup/backups/agenda.txt` while keeping the original.
copy-move-rename-try-it-1.hint: Sèvi ak katab ak non fichye egzak ki nan enstriksyon an, apre sa kouri ls, cat oswa find pou verifye travay ou.

help.concept: Yon travay Eseye li ou menm pèmèt ou pratike kòmand nan leson an nan yon espas travay reyèl.
help.hint_1: Kreye katab paran yo anvan ou kreye oswa deplase fichye.
help.hint_2: Tcheke travay ou avèk ls, cat oswa find anvan ou klike sou Tcheke.

copy-move-rename-try-it-1.starterCode: # Sèvi ak tèminal la pou travay Linux sa a.

0.message: Kouri the cp kòmand montren nan the enstriksyon.
Pa sèvi ak sudo pou travay débutan nan espas travay la.

copy-move-rename-try-it-2.title: Travay tèminal: deplase avèk mv
copy-move-rename-try-it-2.prompt: The destination katab already exists. Sèvi ak `mv` pou deplase `sample-inbox/guest-list.txt` pou `warmup/guests/guest-list.txt`.
copy-move-rename-try-it-2.hint: Sèvi ak katab ak non fichye egzak ki nan enstriksyon an, apre sa kouri ls, cat oswa find pou verifye travay ou.

help.concept: Yon travay Eseye li ou menm pèmèt ou pratike kòmand nan leson an nan yon espas travay reyèl.
help.hint_1: Kreye katab paran yo anvan ou kreye oswa deplase fichye.
help.hint_2: Tcheke travay ou avèk ls, cat oswa find anvan ou klike sou Tcheke.

copy-move-rename-try-it-2.starterCode: # Sèvi ak tèminal la pou travay Linux sa a.

0.message: Kouri the mv kòmand montren nan the enstriksyon.
Pa sèvi ak sudo pou travay débutan nan espas travay la.

copy-move-rename-try-it-3.title: Travay tèminal: chanje non avèk mv
copy-move-rename-try-it-3.prompt: Sèvi ak `mv` pou chanje non `sample-inbox/draft-report.txt` pou `sample-inbox/final-report.txt` nan the same katab.
copy-move-rename-try-it-3.hint: Sèvi ak katab ak non fichye egzak ki nan enstriksyon an, apre sa kouri ls, cat oswa find pou verifye travay ou.

help.hint_1: Kreye katab paran yo anvan ou kreye oswa deplase fichye.

Pa sèvi ak sudo pou travay débutan nan espas travay la.

try_copy_move_rename_sketch0.title: Eseye li ou menm: kopye avèk cp
try_copy_move_rename_sketch0.prompt: Kouri `cp sample-inbox/agenda.txt warmup/backups/agenda.txt` pou practice kopyeing while keeping the original fichye.

try_copy_move_rename_sketch1.title: Eseye li ou menm: deplase avèk mv
try_copy_move_rename_sketch1.prompt: Kouri `mv sample-inbox/guest-list.txt warmup/guests/guest-list.txt` pou practice moving a fichye.

try_copy_move_rename_sketch2.title: Eseye li ou menm: chanje non avèk mv
try_copy_move_rename_sketch2.prompt: Kouri `mv sample-inbox/draft-report.txt sample-inbox/final-report.txt` pou practice renaming avèk mv.

sc-which-command-renames.title: Idantifye kòmand pou chanje non an
sc-which-command-renames.prompt: Ki kòmand chanje nons `plan.txt` pou `project-plan.txt` nan the same katab?
sc-which-command-renames.hint: Renaming uses the same kòmand as moving.

help.concept: Linux uses `mv` for both moving ak renaming because both actions change a fichye's path.
help.hint_1: A kopye kòmand would leave two fichyes behind, which se not a chanje non.
help.hint_2: Choose the kòmand that changes the old name into the new name directly.

mc-copy-vs-move.title: Chwazi deklarasyon ki vre sou cp ak mv
mc-copy-vs-move.prompt: Ki deklarasyon ki kòrèk? Chwazi tout sa ki mache.
mc-copy-vs-move.hint: One kòmand duplicates a fichye, ak the other changes its kote oswa name.

help.concept: `cp` kreyes an additional kopye, while `mv` changes the fichye's path so the original kote oswa name no longer remains the same.
help.hint_1: Chèche statements that match what happens pou the original fichye apre each kòmand.
help.hint_2: A correct choice should describe either duplication avèk `cp` oswa rekote/renaming avèk `mv`.

options.a: `cp notes.txt backup.txt` leaves `notes.txt` nan place ak kreyes `backup.txt`.
options.b: `mv draft.txt final.txt` can chanje non a fichye nan the same katab.
options.c: `cp report.txt archive/` redeplases `report.txt` depi its original katab.
options.d: `mv essay.txt folder/` kreyes two copies of `essay.txt`.

mc-safe-command-choice.title: Chwazi kòmand ki matche ak objektif la
mc-safe-command-choice.prompt: Ou vle pou keep the original fichye `notes.txt` ak also kreye another version avèk a different name. Ki kòmands would achieve that objektif? Chwazi tout sa ki mache.
mc-safe-command-choice.hint: Ou bezwen kòmands that kopye, not deplase.

help.concept: When the original must remain, use `cp`. A chanje non oswa deplase avèk `mv` changes the original path instead of preserving it.
help.hint_1: Any correct kòmand should leave `notes.txt` still existing apre li runs.
help.hint_2: Chèche `cp` kòmands that use `notes.txt` as the source ak a different destination path oswa name.

dr-copy-then-rename-flow.title: Mete fason travay ak fichye a nan lòd
dr-copy-then-rename-flow.prompt: Mete sa yo etaps nan bon lòd for making a backup kopye of `outline.txt` ak then renaming the kopye pou `outline-final.txt`.
dr-copy-then-rename-flow.hint: First make the duplicate, then chanje non the duplicate.

help.concept: A multi-etap fichye workflow depends on what exists apre each kòmand. You cannot chanje non the copied fichye until the kopye has been kreyed.
help.hint_1: The backup fichye must exist anvan li can receive a new name.
help.hint_2: Start avèk the original fichye, kreye a kopye, then chanje non that copied fichye.

ci-copy-class-notes.title: Kopye yon fichye nòt klas
ci-copy-class-notes.prompt: Ou vle a backup anvan editing class notes. Ki outcome montres that `cp` was used correctly?
ci-copy-class-notes.hint: Sèvi ak `cp` avèk the original fichye first ak the backup name second.

help.concept: `cp` duplicates a fichye. The source stays nan place, ak a new fichye se kreyed at the destination path.
help.hint_1: Ou bezwen two fichyes at the end: the original `class-notes.txt` ak a new `class-notes-backup.txt`.
help.hint_2: Kouri a kopye kòmand where `class-notes.txt` se the source ak `class-notes-backup.txt` se the destination name.

ci-copy-class-notes.template: A correct backup etap should ____ so ou can see both the original ak the kopye.
choices: enprime yon rezilta ou ka wè

ci-move-report-into-folder.title: Deplase yon rapò nan bon katab la
ci-move-report-into-folder.prompt: A report belongs nan `submissions`, not nan the katab aktyèl la. Ki rezilta montres that `mv` was used correctly?
ci-move-report-into-folder.hint: Sèvi ak `mv` avèk the fichye name ak the destination katab.

help.concept: `mv` relocates a fichye oswa katab. After moving, the item exists nan the new kote instead of the old one.
help.hint_1: The destination katab already exists, so ou fè not need pou kreye it.
help.hint_2: Move `report.txt` so the final path becomes `submissions/report.txt`.

ci-move-report-into-folder.template: After moving a fichye, pi bon tcheke se pou ____ so the new kote se visible.
choices: enprime yon rezilta ou ka wè

sketch-1.title: Kopye fichye avèk cp
sketch-1.bodyMarkdown:
`cp` makes a duplicate of a fichye ak leaves the original nan place. This se useful when ou want a backup oswa when ou need the same kontni nan a second kote.

Worked example:

```bash
cp notes.txt backup-notes.txt
```

Step by etap:
- `cp` se the kopye kòmand.
- `notes.txt` se the source fichye ou already have.
- `backup-notes.txt` se the new fichye that will be kreyed.

After this kòmand, both fichyes exist.

If ou kopye into a katab, the fichye keeps its name unless ou give a new one:

```bash
cp notes.txt archive/notes.txt
```

That kòmand copies `notes.txt` into the `archive` katab. The original fichye still stays where li started.

sketch-2.title: Deplase fichye ak katab avèk mv
sketch-2.bodyMarkdown:
`mv` changes where a fichye oswa katab lives. Unlike `cp`, li fè not leave the original behind.

Worked example:

```bash
mv draft.txt school/
```

Step by etap:
- `mv` se the deplase kòmand.
- `draft.txt` se the item ou want pou relocate.
- `school/` se the destination katab.

After the kòmand, `draft.txt` se no longer nan the old kote. It se now inside `school/`.

You can also deplase katabs:

```bash
mv notes archive/
```

That places the whole `notes` katab inside `archive`.

sketch-3.title: Chanje non avèk mv
sketch-3.bodyMarkdown:
In Linux, renaming se also done avèk `mv`. Ou se moving a fichye depi its old name pou its new name nan the same katab.

Worked example:

```bash
mv todo.txt tasks.txt
```

Step by etap:
- `mv` starts the chanje non.
- `todo.txt` se the current name.
- `tasks.txt` se the new name.

After the kòmand, `todo.txt` no longer exists, ak `tasks.txt` exists instead.

You can chanje non while moving too:

```bash
mv draft.txt projects/final.txt
```

That changes both the kote ak the name nan one kòmand.
